# Prusa fixtures — attribution

`tests/fixtures/prusa/PrusaResearch.ini` is an unmodified copy of the
profile bundle shipped with [PrusaSlicer](https://github.com/prusa3d/PrusaSlicer),
licensed under **AGPL-3.0**. Sourced from
`resources/profiles/PrusaResearch.ini` on the `master` branch.

The fixture is present only to give the translator test suite real-world
inputs to parse; it is not redistributed as part of the library itself.

**License**: AGPL-3.0 for the profile file. See the PrusaSlicer
repository LICENSE for the full terms. The rest of this project is
Apache-2.0 — the fixtures directory is the sole location of AGPL-licensed
content in the tree.
